# Vendored Runtime Assets

This folder contains the browser runtime assets required for offline use.

- Three.js 0.160.0: core module, OrbitControls, and OutlineEffect.
- @phosphor-icons/web 2.1.2: regular icon font CSS and font files.
- @fontsource/fira-sans 5.2.7: local Fira Sans font files used by the UI.
- @fontsource/fira-code 5.2.7: local Fira Code font files used by controls.

Run `npm install` and `npm run build:vendor` after changing these dependencies.
